characters.name: Goon squad
characters.description: The Goon squadare underFrancis Grimes' command in theDepartment of Integration'sLaw Enforcement Department. Their duty is to enforce the law where the immigrants andspeciesare concerned. However, under the anti-immigrant Grimes' leadership, they are very brutal to both the law breakers and the victims of species-related crimes.

characters.name: Goon squad
characters.description: The Goon squadare underFrancis Grimes' command in theDepartment of Integration'sLaw Enforcement Department. Their duty is to enforce the law where the immigrants andspeciesare concerned. characters.name: Mark's class
characters.description: Mark Lillyruns a class for the new immigrants, and sometimes integration law offenders and their victims, at theDepartment of Social Services. While one time a plaque labeled "Group Counseling" is seen on the wall outside the classroom in theepisode"Mummy Dearest", Mark and others simply call it "Class" throughout the series. And thus Mark calls everyone in the class his students. Mark's class is where most stories in the series take place, and many students arerecurring charactersin the show.

characters.name: Mark's class
characters.description: Mark Lillyruns a class for the new immigrants, and sometimes integration law offenders and their victims, at theDepartment of Social Services. While one time a plaque labeled "Group Counseling" is seen on the wall outside the classroom in theepisode"Mummy Dearest", Mark and others simply call it "Class" throughout the series. And thus Mark calls everyone in the class his students. Mark's class is where most stories in the series take place, and many students arerecurring charactersin the show.

characters.name: The Girls' Club
characters.description: The Girls' Clubis a private association that a group of female creatures in theUgly Americansuniverse have organized. It holds regular meetings where the girls talk about problems involved in their lives, such as the timeCallie Maggotbonetold othersMark Lillygot close to another girl. The Girls' Club is first seen in theepisode"Lilly and the Beast". The guys have their own association, "The Man Club".

characters.name: The Man Club
characters.description: The Man Clubis a private association that a group of male creatures in theUgly Americansuniverse have organized. It holds regular meetings where the boys talk about problems involved in their lives, such as whenMark Lillytold others that he caught his girlfriendCallie Maggotbonehaving sex with other men. It seems the Man Club is supposed to follow "Lilly's Rules To Live By" but the members just ignore them. The Man Club is first seen in theepisode"Lilly and the Beast". The girls have their own group, "The Girls' Club".

characters.name: Abraham Lincoln
characters.description: Abraham LincolnSpeciesZombieGenderMaleOccupationFormer U.S. presidentOnly EpisodeKill, Mark... Kill! The famous former U.S. presidentAbraham Lincolnhas become azombieinUgly Americans, as seen in theepisode"Kill, Mark... Kill!". The TV entertainment showAbscess Hollywoodreports that he is going out withJessica Alba, and they are going to attend a Broadway show.Randall Skeffingtoncalls the couple by the nickname "Albaham".

characters.name: Abscess Hollywood hosts
characters.description: Abscess Hollywood hostsSpeciesAss head/HumanGenderMale / FemaleOccupationHosts ofAbscess HollywoodIntroducedKill, Mark... Kill! TheAbscess Hollywoodhosts, as the title implies, are the two hosts of the television showAbscess Hollywood. One of them is ahumanbrunette woman and the other one is anass headman who has an ass for his head and speaks with the anus. Their showAbscess Hollywoodreports on news about Hollywood celebrity and entertainment, which is a spoof on the showAccess Hollywoodin the real world. They are first seen in theepisode"Kill, Mark... Kill!" where they report on a story betweenJessica AlbaandzombieAbraham Lincoln.

characters.name: Al Pacino
characters.description: Al PacinoSpeciesHumanGenderMaleOccupationActorIntroducedTreegasm Al Pacinoin real life is a very famous American actor. He appears in theepisode"Treegasm". He delivers a speech inCentral Parkfor the public event of "Treegasm".

characters.name: Alan Whiter
characters.description: Alan WhiterAlan Whiter in the midst ofMad Larry DiseasevictimsSpeciesHumanGenderMaleOccupationNews correspondentIntroducedSo, You Want to Be a Vampire?Last SeenThe Roast of Twayne the Boneraper WhileAlan Whiteris first seen inUgly Americansinseason 1's sixthepisode"So, You Want to Be a Vampire?", he made his first appearance a lot earlier as the talk show host of the webseries5-On with Alan Whiter. He is a TV news correspondent in "So, You Want to Be a Vampire?" onNew York Channel 2 News. He reports on the spread of "Mad Larry Disease" and is seen to put on a medical mask when an inflicted girl holds onto his arm.

characters.name: Albert
characters.description: AlbertBaby AlbertVoiceMike O'GormanSpeciesManbirdGenderMaleAgeA few daysRelativesArturo(father)IntroducedThe Manbirds Albert(voiced byMike O'Gorman) is a babymanbirdthatMark Lillyfinds inCentral Park. His mother has been killed byFrancis Grimesand his fatherArturodoes not know where he is. Mark takes the baby manbird home and teaches him to sing in theepisode"The ManBirds". As a result, Albert has not learnt the Manbird language. Mark identifies Arturo as Albert's father on TV by their socks. He brings Albert toMadison Square Gardento watch his father fight. Arturo ends up beaten byThe Collectorand is about to die. After Mark's encouragement, Albert flies to Arturo's side and starts to sing. Arturo is sickened by the song and takes away his son's socks with his dying breath. Then Albert is hit by coins and other stuff thrown on stage by other manbirds.

characters.name: Aldermach Maggotbone
characters.description: Aldermach MaggotboneAKASkinny BobVoiceLarry MurphySpeciesDemonGenderMaleOccupationLeader of HellRelativesCallie Maggotbone(daughter),Lillith Maggotbone(daughter),Rosie(ex-wife),Brooke(late wife),Sandy(wife)IntroducedPilot Aldermach Maggotbone(voiced byLarry Murphy) is theDevil, the leader ofHell. He isCallie's father. He used to be the chief prosecutor in Hell's court, probably for 2,000 years, and would like Callie to work there, too. He is known as "Skinny Bob" before he succeeded as the leader of Hell 35 years ago, as told inepisode"Ride Me to Hell". He runs his own soul trading business, Maggotbone Soul Industries. Its stock has been tumbling in the episode "Wail Street". After the event of acquiringMark Lilly's supposedly massive soul, which turns out to be the size of a pea, the stock plummets to a new low.

He is known as "Skinny Bob" before he succeeded as the leader of Hell 35 years ago, as told inepisode"Ride Me to Hell". He runs his own soul trading business, Maggotbone Soul Industries. Its stock has been tumbling in the episode "Wail Street". After the event of acquiringMark Lilly's supposedly massive soul, which turns out to be the size of a pea, the stock plummets to a new low.

She makes her first appearance in the barSub ClubwhereMark Lillygoes at the end of thepilotepisode. She ends up having some fun withRandall Skeffington.

characters.description: AshtonAshton after smashing a windowSpeciesZombieGenderMaleOccupationFormer school bus driverIntroducedBetter Off Undead Ashtonis azombiestudent in theNew Paltz Zombieology Center. He is seen smashing a window then says hi toXavier Gatesin theepisode"Better Off Undead". Xavier Gates tellsRandall Skeffingtonthat Ashton used to be a school bus driver.

characters.name: Barney Snodgrass
characters.description: Barney SnodgrassAKA?SpeciesHumanGenderMaleOccupationSocial services coordinatorIntroducedFools for Love Barney Snodgrasswas the social services coordinator beforeMark Lillyand used to beCallie's boyfriend. He was sent to a mental hospital for killingErik. He escapes 5 years later to seek revenge on everyone in theDepartment of Integration, in theepisode"Fools for Love". Barney loves pranks. He believed in teaching through public humiliation and cruelty in the DOI. However, when he was at the receiving end of a prank onApril Fools' Dayfive years ago, he lashed out and stabbed Erik to death. That was how Erik, originally a human, got rebuilt into arobot.Francis Grimesarrested Barney and sent him to theNew York City Mental Hospital.

characters.name: Bat boy
characters.description: Bat BoyGenderMaleOnly EpisodeThe Dork KnightBat boys are bat-like creatures with a venom that is so unstable and unpredictable that if a person is bitten by one, then that person must have the body part where they were bitten cut off or get bit by a koala man (such asDoug).

characters.name: Bat-Boy
characters.description: Bat boys are bat-like creatures with a venom that is so unstable and unpredictable that if a person is bitten by one, then that person must have the body part where they were bitten cut off or get bit by a koala man (such asDoug).

characters.name: Batperson
characters.description: BatpersonBatpersonBatperson unmaskedAKAMark LillySpeciesHumanpoisoned bybat boyvenomGenderMaleOccupationVigilanteIntroducedThe Dork KnightLast SeenThe Dork Knight Batpersonis the result ofMark Lillygetting bitten on the genital by a rabidbat boynicknamedBrucein theepisode"The Dork Knight". The venom from the bite causes him to turn into a bat boy gradually and gives him exceptional hearing, night vision and a supersonic screech. Mark decides to fight crime and makes himself a costume and calls himself "Batperson". He uses his supersonic screech to fight thecat burglarsinNew York City. Grimes has a meeting with him and lets him keep on being a vigilante on the condition that he takes a sidekick,Koala Boy, who is actuallyDoug.

characters.name: Beatrice
characters.description: BeatriceSpeciesWizardGenderFemaleBorn1635Age376 (died on 2011)OccupationWizard princessRelativesMark Lilly(widower),Leonard Powers(ex-fiancé)IntroducedThe Ring of PowersLast SeenThe Ring of Powers Beatrice Sizebedappears in theepisode"The Ring of Powers". She is awizardprincess and the heiress to the Bedfellow throne, which is theMattress King and Queen of New York. She is originally engaged toLeonard Powers, but gets switched toMark Lillywhen Mark tries on Leonard's engagement ring. Leonard made the biggest mistake of his life three centuries ago by proposing to Beatrice. However, he managed to "put it on ice" by literally putting her inside a block of ice. When Mark is charmed into trying on Leonard's ring, the marriage countdown begins... but with Mark as the groom instead. The ring also gives Mark the "power of influence".

characters.name: Benji Dalton
characters.description: Benji DaltonSpeciesHumanGenderMaleOccupationActorIntroducedRide Me to Hell Benji Daltonis seen at the beginning of theepisode"Ride Me to Hell". He is an actor that plays a detective named Brock in the TV seriesDishonorable Discharge, spoofingTony Shalhoub's characterAdrian Monkin the TV seriesMonk. Dishonorable Dischargeends with an angel's dream. Its executive producers areDamon Lindelof and Carlton Cuse.

characters.name: Bert
characters.description: BertSpecies?GenderMaleOccupationFormer social workerIntroducedPilot Bertis a minor character inUgly Americans. He is a giant bulky humanoid with tiny arms and grayish-green skin. Bert is a social worker in theDepartment of Integrationthat gets laid off in thepilotepisode. WhileMark Lillyis walking down the street, Bert grabs and swallows him whole outside the department.Leonard Powersintervenes and makes Bert spit Mark out. Then Bert says to Mark, "Now you know how it feels to be chewed up and spit out by the system, man."

characters.name: Billy
characters.description: BillySpeciesSquidGenderMaleIntroducedPilot Billyis a minor character inUgly Americans. He makes his debut in thepilotepisode. Billy is a Jewishsquid. He gets interrogated byFrancis Grimesfor information at theChelsea Piers. When Grimes is "airboarding" him, Billy tells Grimes that he can't think straight "with all that sonar equipment they're using now."Mark Lillythen saves Billy by giving Grimes the squid's paperwork, proving that Billy is an American citizen. Mark tells Grimes that he was at Billy's bar mitzvah.

characters.name: Blago
characters.description: BlagoSpeciesHumanGenderMaleRelativesCroatian Man(uncle)IntroducedJourney to the Center of Twayne Blagois a character that is only mentioned in theepisode, "Journey to the Center of Twayne".Croatian ManasksMark Lillyfor permission to squishJerry McMillanand Jerry replies, "I will make sure to look up your little nephew Blago next time I'm in Zagreb." Croatian Man gets concerned and says, "Blago was just accepted to the ballet barn of Croatia." Mark assures him that nothing is going to happen to Blago.

characters.name: Blake
characters.description: BlakeSpeciesVampireGenderMaleAge20'sRelativesA vampire fatherTristan Grimes(wife)Francis Grimes(Father-in-law)Vera(Mother-in-law)Suri, Zahara, Shiloh, Moon Unit, Apple, Rumer and Pilot Inspektor Grimes(sisters-in-law)IntroducedSo, You Want to Be a Vampire? Blakeis avampireseen in theepisode"So, You Want to Be a Vampire?" He is first seen trying to biteFrancis Grimes' daughter,Tristan, and is arrested. He and Tristan are both sent toMark Lilly'sclassby court for illegalvampire conversion. Grimes strongly dislikes them dating as his own wifeVerahas left him for a vampire,the Count.

characters.name: Blob (character)
characters.description: BlobSpeciesBlobGenderPortrayed as maleIntroducedBlob Gets Job Blobis the central character in theepisode"Blob Gets Job". Ablobcomes out from the sewers and swarms to the city, swallowing everything in its path, until it is brought down byFrancis Grimeswith ataser. It is sent to theDepartment of IntegrationunderLeonard Powers's charge. Leonard just calls itBlob.

characters.description: Bob SanchezSpeciesCyclopsGenderMaleOccupationNews correspondentIntroducedTreegasm Bob Sanchezis a yellow cyclops. He is a news correspondent forNew York Channel 2 News. He appears in theepisode"Treegasm", providing live news coverage at the Treegasm event.
